title: Welcome to Gachi Foundation
author: Gachi Foundation
excerpt: We are a newly registered Section 8 non-profit working across the Santhal Pargana region of Jharkhand. Here is what we set out to do.
body: Gachi Foundation was registered on 09 October 2025 as a Section 8 company, with a simple belief: a community thrives when its heritage and its future are tended with equal care.
We work across four districts — Dumka, Pakur, Godda and Sahibganj — on three fronts: protecting the environment, expanding access to education, and creating dignified livelihoods.
This blog is where we will share updates from the ground, stories from the communities we work with, and the milestones along the way. Thank you for being here at the very beginning.

title: Why we celebrate Jharkhand's living culture
author: Gachi Foundation
excerpt: From Sohrai wall paintings to Tasar silk and the Chhau dance, Jharkhand's culture is a living inheritance worth protecting.
body: Jharkhand is not one story but many. Its Sohrai and Khovar wall paintings, the masked Chhau dance, golden Tasar silk and ancient Dokra metalcraft are world-class traditions kept alive by ordinary hands.
Protecting culture is not separate from development — it is development. Reviving crafts creates income; honouring festivals strengthens community; telling these stories builds pride.
In the months ahead we will profile the artisans and traditions of the region, and the families keeping them alive.
